title: croton borneensis
intro: Croton borneensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the Borneo croton or borneensis croton. It is native to the tropical forests of Borneo and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Croton borneensis is typically used in the form of a tincture, infusion, or decoction, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
